creator: freebsd@onyphe.io
text:
(In reply to w.schwarzenfeld from comment #20)

Hi,

the elasticsearch5 5.6.8 is broken in regards to JNA. We have made patches available for 5.6.4 in the past which took care of that issue. We don't see the relevant code into this 5.6.8.

As a result, elasticsearch5 5.6.8 refuses to start with the following warnings and errors:

[2018-02-25T09:09:04,373][WARN ][o.e.b.Natives            ] unable to load JNA native support library, native methods will be disabled.
java.lang.UnsatisfiedLinkError: Native library (com/sun/jna/freebsd-x86-64/libjnidispatch.so) not found in resource path ([file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/java-version-checker-5.6.8.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/joda-time-2.9.5.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/lucene-spatial-extras-6.6.1.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/lucene-join-6.6.1.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/lucene-misc-6.6.1.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/lucene-queries-6.6.1.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/lucene-queryparser-6.6.1.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/lucene-sandbox-6.6.1.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/lucene-spatial-6.6.1.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/HdrHistogram-2.1.9.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/hppc-0.7.1.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/elasticsearch-5.6.8.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/jopt-simple-5.0.2.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/jts-1.13.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/log4j-1.2-api-2.9.1.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/log4j-api-2.9.1.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/log4j-core-2.9.1.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/lucene-analyzers-common-6.6.1.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/lucene-backward-codecs-6.6.1.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/lucene-core-6.6.1.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/lucene-grouping-6.6.1.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/lucene-highlighter-6.6.1.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/lucene-memory-6.6.1.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/lucene-spatial3d-6.6.1.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/lucene-suggest-6.6.1.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/jackson-core-2.8.6.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/jna-4.4.0-1.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/plugin-cli-5.6.8.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/securesm-1.2.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/snakeyaml-1.15.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/spatial4j-0.6.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/t-digest-3.0.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/jackson-dataformat-cbor-2.8.6.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/jackson-dataformat-smile-2.8.6.jar, file:/usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/lib/jackson-dataformat-yaml-2.8.6.jar])
        at com.sun.jna.Native.loadNativeDispatchLibraryFromClasspath(Native.java:962) ~[jna-4.4.0-1.jar:4.4.0 (b0)]
        at com.sun.jna.Native.loadNativeDispatchLibrary(Native.java:922) ~[jna-4.4.0-1.jar:4.4.0 (b0)]
        at com.sun.jna.Native.<clinit>(Native.java:190) ~[jna-4.4.0-1.jar:4.4.0 (b0)]
        at java.lang.Class.forName0(Native Method) ~[?:1.8.0_162]
        at java.lang.Class.forName(Class.java:264) ~[?:1.8.0_162]
        at org.elasticsearch.bootstrap.Natives.<clinit>(Natives.java:45) [elasticsearch-5.6.8.jar:5.6.8]
        at org.elasticsearch.bootstrap.Bootstrap.initializeNatives(Bootstrap.java:105) [elasticsearch-5.6.8.jar:5.6.8]
        at org.elasticsearch.bootstrap.Bootstrap.setup(Bootstrap.java:195) [elasticsearch-5.6.8.jar:5.6.8]
        at org.elasticsearch.bootstrap.Bootstrap.init(Bootstrap.java:342) [elasticsearch-5.6.8.jar:5.6.8]
        at org.elasticsearch.bootstrap.Elasticsearch.init(Elasticsearch.java:132) [elasticsearch-5.6.8.jar:5.6.8]
        at org.elasticsearch.bootstrap.Elasticsearch.execute(Elasticsearch.java:123) [elasticsearch-5.6.8.jar:5.6.8]
        at org.elasticsearch.cli.EnvironmentAwareCommand.execute(EnvironmentAwareCommand.java:70) [elasticsearch-5.6.8.jar:5.6.8]
        at org.elasticsearch.cli.Command.mainWithoutErrorHandling(Command.java:134) [elasticsearch-5.6.8.jar:5.6.8]

        at org.elasticsearch.bootstrap.Elasticsearch.main(Elasticsearch.java:91) [elasticsearch-5.6.8.jar:5.6.8]
        at org.elasticsearch.bootstrap.Elasticsearch.main(Elasticsearch.java:84) [elasticsearch-5.6.8.jar:5.6.8]
[2018-02-25T09:09:04,394][WARN ][o.e.b.Natives            ] cannot check if running as root because JNA is not available
[2018-02-25T09:09:04,394][WARN ][o.e.b.Natives            ] cannot install system call filter because JNA is not available
[2018-02-25T09:09:04,394][WARN ][o.e.b.Natives            ] cannot mlockall because JNA is not available
[2018-02-25T09:09:04,395][WARN ][o.e.b.Natives            ] cannot register console handler because JNA is not available
[2018-02-25T09:09:04,398][WARN ][o.e.b.Natives            ] cannot getrlimit RLIMIT_NPROC because JNA is not available
[2018-02-25T09:09:04,398][WARN ][o.e.b.Natives            ] cannot getrlimit RLIMIT_AS beacuse JNA is not available
[2018-02-25T09:09:04,398][WARN ][o.e.b.Natives            ] cannot getrlimit RLIMIT_FSIZE because JNA is not available


And a little bit later on:

[2018-02-25T09:09:15,242][ERROR][o.e.b.Bootstrap          ] [dnode] node validation exception
[2] bootstrap checks failed
[1]: memory locking requested for elasticsearch process but memory is not locked
[2]: system call filters failed to install; check the logs and fix your configuration or disable system call filters at your own risk
[2018-02-25T09:09:15,244][INFO ][o.e.n.Node               ] [dnode] stopping ...
